description: The TrailsRenderBufferRenderer component is mainly a debug component to show the allocation of rendering buffers for particles in the form of colors. This relies on the specific implementation of Photon Dust.

fields.Buffer: The trails renderer module to get buffer data from.
fields.Material: The material to use for rendering.
fields.TextureMode: The texture mode to use for rendering.
fields.MotionVectorMode: The motion vector mode for rendering from a camera.
fields.GenerateLightingData: Whether or not to generate lighting data for trail rendering.
